MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. LAWRENCE L. LOCKWOOD, ESQ. (Tel: 707-647-2205) specially appearing for attorney Steven Booska for plaintiff Reviver Financial, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC'S Motion For Change Of Venue.

Matter submitted without argument. Plaintiff Reviver Financial, LLC's Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
